text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 283 

PRE_ICL_OONP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Out-of-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for Other Days’ Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a for a day’s supply of the drugs 
(other than 1 or 3 months) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the pre-
initial coverage limit (ICL) phase of the Part D benefit.
